name: Peach and Apple Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the onions and process them in a food processor.
2. Slice the garlic by hand.
3. Thinly slice the ginger root by hand.
4. Slice the peaches.
5. Combine all ingredients (onions, apples, garlic, ginger, peaches) with brown sugar, raisins, salt, cayenne pepper, ground cloves, and vinegar in a large pot.
6. Stir until all the sugar has dissolved.
7. Taste the liquid and adjust seasoning as desired.
8. Keep stirring over low heat until the fruit is soft and the liquid has reduced (3-4 hours).
9. Store the chutney in sterilized jars.
